steps.title: Identify the slope and intercept
steps.content:
The equation is in slope-intercept form $s = 68m + 320$.
The coefficient of $m$ is the slope: $68$ steps per minute.
The constant term is the intercept: the value of $s$ when $m = 0$.
$$s = 68m + 320$$
$$s = 68(0) + 320 = 320$$
Thus, 320 is the number of steps taken before any minutes have elapsed.

steps.title: Interpret the intercept in context
steps.content:
The variable $m$ counts minutes after the start of the walk, so $m = 0$ corresponds to the moment before she begins walking.
Therefore, the intercept $320$ represents the steps Priya had already taken that afternoon before starting her walk.
That is the correct answer.
